# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI Pipeline with Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [ main, develop ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ main, develop ]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache node_modules
        id: cache-node-modules
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .npm-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Install Node dependencies
        if: steps.cache-node-modules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm ci

      - name: Cache Node build outputs
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            .next
            out
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pip packages
        id: cache-pip
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            venv
            .venv
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}-

      - name: Create virtual environment
        if: steps.cache-pip.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m venv venv
          source venv/bin/activate
          pip install --upgrade pip setuptools wheel

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.cache-pip.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          source venv/bin/activate
          if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements.txt; fi
          if [ -f requirements-dev.txt ]; then pip install -r requirements-dev.txt; fi

      - name: Cache configuration files
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            .env.local
            .env.production
            .env.development
            config/*.json
            config/*.yaml
            config/*.yml
            .eslintcache
            .stylelintcache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-

      - name: Cache TypeScript/Babel cache
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            .tsbuildinfo
            .babel-cache
            node_modules/.cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-ts-babel-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/tsconfig.json', '**/.babelrc', '**/babel.config.js') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-ts-babel-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Cache test coverage
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            coverage
            .coverage
            .nyc_output
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-coverage-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-coverage-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Build Node project
        run: npm run build

      - name: Run Node tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Run Python tests
        run: |
          source venv/bin/activate
          pytest

  deploy:
    needs: build-and-test
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Restore node_modules cache
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .npm-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Restore build outputs cache
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            .next
            out
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}

      - name: Restore production config
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            .env.production
            config/*.json
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**', '.env.*') }}

      - name: Deploy application
        run: echo "Deploying application..."
